member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Api.JellyTubeController
member.summary: REST API endpoints for the YouTube Downloader plugin. All endpoints require Jellyfin admin privileges.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Api.JellyTubeController.#ctor(Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.DownloadQueueService,Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.YtDlpService,Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.DownloadArchiveService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Api.JellyTubeController.EnqueueDownload(Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Api.EnqueueRequest)
member.summary: Enqueues a new download job.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Api.JellyTubeController.GetJobs
member.summary: Returns all download jobs (active, pending, and completed).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Api.JellyTubeController.GetJob(System.Guid)
member.summary: Returns a single job by its ID.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Api.JellyTubeController.CancelJob(System.Guid)
member.summary: Cancels a queued job.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Api.JellyTubeController.FetchMetadata(Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Api.FetchMetadataRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetches metadata for a YouTube URL without downloading it.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Api.JellyTubeController.GetUiScript
member.summary: Serves the plugin UI JavaScript file.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Api.JellyTubeController.CheckTools
member.summary: Checks whether yt-dlp and ffmpeg are available and returns their versions.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Api.JellyTubeController.ClearFinishedJobs
member.summary: Removes all completed, failed, and cancelled jobs from the list.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Api.JellyTubeController.CancelAllJobs
member.summary: Cancels all active (queued or in-progress) jobs.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Api.JellyTubeController.ClearArchive
member.summary: Clears the download archive so all scheduled playlist videos can be re-downloaded.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Api.JellyTubeController.GetStatus
member.summary: Returns a summary of queue statistics.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Api.EnqueueRequest
member.summary: Request body for enqueuing a download.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Api.EnqueueRequest.#ctor(System.String,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Request body for enqueuing a download.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Api.FetchMetadataRequest
member.summary: Request body for fetching metadata.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Api.FetchMetadataRequest.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Request body for fetching metadata.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Api.QueueStatus
member.summary: Summary of the download queue state.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Api.QueueStatus.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Summary of the download queue state.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Api.ToolsCheckResult
member.summary: Availability and version info for required tools.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Api.ToolsCheckResult.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Availability and version info for required tools.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Configuration.PluginConfiguration
member.summary: Plugin configuration.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.DownloadPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the base directory where downloaded videos are stored.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.YtDlpBinaryPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the path to the yt-dlp binary. Leave empty to use the one on PATH.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.FfmpegBinaryPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the path to the ffmpeg binary. Leave empty to use the one on PATH.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.VideoFormat
member.summary: Gets or sets the yt-dlp format string for video quality selection.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.PreferredContainer
member.summary: Gets or sets the preferred output container: mp4, mkv, or webm.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.MaxConcurrentDownloads
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of simultaneous downloads.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.OrganiseByChannel
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to organise videos into channel subfolders.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.DownloadSubtitles
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to download subtitles.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.SubtitleLanguages
member.summary: Gets or sets the subtitle language codes (comma-separated, e.g. "en,de").

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.TriggerLibraryScanAfterDownload
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to trigger a Jellyfin library scan after downloads complete.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.EnableScheduledDownloads
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether scheduled playlist downloads are enabled.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.ScheduledEntries
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of scheduled playlist/channel entries, each with its own optional download path.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.PlaylistMaxAgeDays
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum age in days for playlist items (0 = unlimited).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.WriteNfoFiles
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to write .nfo metadata files.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.DownloadThumbnails
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to download video thumbnails.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.DeleteWatchedScheduledVideos
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether watched videos from scheduled downloads are automatically deleted.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.DeleteWatchedManualVideos
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether watched videos from manual downloads are automatically deleted.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.DefaultAudioLanguage
member.summary: Gets or sets the default audio language tag to embed in downloaded files (e.g. "deu", "eng", "fra"). Leave empty to not set a language tag.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.CookiesFilePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the path to a Netscape-format cookies file for authenticated YouTube downloads. Leave empty to download without cookies.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Helpers.DateParser
member.summary: Utility for parsing yt-dlp date strings.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Helpers.DateParser.ParseYtDate(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a yt-dlp upload date string in YYYYMMDD format into a nullable . Returns null if the input is null, empty, or cannot be parsed.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Helpers.PathSanitizer
member.summary: Utility for sanitizing strings to be safe for use as filesystem path segments.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Helpers.PathSanitizer.Sanitize(System.String)
member.summary: Replaces characters that are illegal on Windows and Linux filesystems with underscores and trims the result to a safe length.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.DownloadJob
member.summary: Represents a single download job in the queue.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.DownloadJob.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier of this job.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.DownloadJob.Url
member.summary: Gets or sets the YouTube URL (video or playlist).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.DownloadJob.IsPlaylist
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this URL points to a playlist.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.DownloadJob.Status
member.summary: Gets or sets the current job status.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.DownloadJob.ProgressPercent
member.summary: Gets or sets the download progress (0–100).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.DownloadJob.CurrentFile
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the file currently being downloaded.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.DownloadJob.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets the error message if the job failed.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.DownloadJob.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets the time this job was created.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.DownloadJob.StartedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the time this job started processing (left the queue).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.DownloadJob.CompletedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the time this job completed (or failed).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.DownloadJob.Metadata
member.summary: Gets or sets the fetched video metadata.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.DownloadJob.IsScheduled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this job was started by the scheduled task.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.DownloadJob.DownloadedFilePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the full path to the downloaded video file (set after download completes).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.DownloadJob.OverrideDownloadPath
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional download directory override. Overrides the global DownloadPath for this job.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.DownloadJob.MaxAgeDays
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum video age in days for playlist downloads (0 = use global/unlimited).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.DownloadJob.DeleteWatched
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether watched files should be deleted for this job.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.DownloadJobStatus
member.summary: Represents the current state of a download job.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.DownloadJobStatus.Queued
member.summary: Job is waiting in the queue.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.DownloadJobStatus.FetchingMetadata
member.summary: Fetching video metadata from YouTube.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.DownloadJobStatus.Downloading
member.summary: Actively downloading the video file.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.DownloadJobStatus.WritingMetadata
member.summary: Writing NFO and thumbnail files.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.DownloadJobStatus.Completed
member.summary: Download and metadata writing completed successfully.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.DownloadJobStatus.Failed
member.summary: Download failed due to an error.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.DownloadJobStatus.Cancelled
member.summary: Download was cancelled by the user.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.ScheduledPlaylistEntry
member.summary: A single scheduled playlist/channel URL with an optional custom download path.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.ScheduledPlaylistEntry.Url
member.summary: Gets or sets the playlist or channel URL.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.ScheduledPlaylistEntry.DownloadPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the download path override. Empty means use the global DownloadPath.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.ScheduledPlaylistEntry.MaxAgeDays
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum video age in days (0 = unlimited, falls back to global PlaylistMaxAgeDays).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.ScheduledPlaylistEntry.DeleteWatched
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether watched videos from this entry are automatically deleted.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.VideoMetadata
member.summary: Internal representation of YouTube video metadata, decoupled from YoutubeDLSharp types.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.VideoMetadata.VideoId
member.summary: Gets or sets the YouTube video ID (e.g. "dQw4w9WgXcQ").

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.VideoMetadata.Title
member.summary: Gets or sets the video title.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.VideoMetadata.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the video description.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.VideoMetadata.ChannelName
member.summary: Gets or sets the channel/uploader name.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.VideoMetadata.ChannelId
member.summary: Gets or sets the channel ID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.VideoMetadata.UploaderUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the uploader URL.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.VideoMetadata.UploadDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the upload date.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.VideoMetadata.DurationSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the duration in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.VideoMetadata.ViewCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the view count.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.VideoMetadata.LikeCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the like count.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.VideoMetadata.ThumbnailUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the thumbnail URL.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.VideoMetadata.WebpageUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the YouTube watch URL.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.VideoMetadata.Tags
member.summary: Gets or sets the video tags.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.VideoMetadata.Categories
member.summary: Gets or sets the video categories.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.VideoMetadata.PlaylistTitle
member.summary: Gets or sets the playlist title, if the video is part of a playlist.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.VideoMetadata.PlaylistIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets the index within a playlist.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Plugin
member.summary: The main plugin class.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Plugin.Instance
member.summary: Gets the singleton instance of this plugin.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Plugin.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths,MediaBrowser.Model.Serialization.IXmlSerializer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.ScheduledTasks.DownloadQueueTask
member.summary: Jellyfin scheduled task that processes the download queue. Visible in the Jellyfin admin panel under Scheduled Tasks → YouTube Downloader.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.ScheduledTasks.DownloadQueueTask.#ctor(Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.DownloadQueueService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.ScheduledTasks.DownloadQueueTask})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.ScheduledTasks.UpdateYtDlpTask
member.summary: Jellyfin scheduled task that downloads the latest yt-dlp binary. Runs weekly by default.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.ScheduledTasks.UpdateYtDlpTask.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.ScheduledTasks.UpdateYtDlpTask})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.ServiceRegistrator
member.summary: Registers plugin services with Jellyfin's dependency injection container.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.DownloadArchiveService
member.summary: Manages the yt-dlp download archive file. Video IDs written here are skipped by yt-dlp on future scheduled downloads.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.DownloadArchiveService.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.DownloadArchiveService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.DownloadArchiveService.ArchivePath
member.summary: Gets the path to the archive file passed to yt-dlp via --download-archive.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.DownloadArchiveService.Contains(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the given YouTube video ID is already in the archive.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.DownloadArchiveService.Add(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a YouTube video ID to the archive so yt-dlp will skip it in future downloads.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.DownloadArchiveService.Clear
member.summary: Clears the archive file and the in-memory set so all videos can be re-downloaded.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.DownloadQueueService
member.summary: Thread-safe in-memory queue that manages download jobs.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.DownloadQueueService.Reader
member.summary: Gets the channel reader used by worker tasks to receive job IDs.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.DownloadQueueService.Enqueue(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.String,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Enqueues a new download job and returns it.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.DownloadQueueService.GetJob(System.Guid)
member.summary: Returns a job by its ID, or null if not found.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.DownloadQueueService.GetAllJobs
member.summary: Returns all jobs ordered by creation time (newest first).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.DownloadQueueService.Cancel(System.Guid)
member.summary: Marks a queued or downloading job as cancelled.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.DownloadQueueService.CancelAllActive
member.summary: Marks all currently active jobs (not yet completed/failed/cancelled) as cancelled.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.DownloadQueueService.ClearFinished
member.summary: Removes all completed, failed, and cancelled jobs from the in-memory list immediately.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.DownloadQueueService.PruneOldJobs(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Removes completed, failed, or cancelled jobs older than the given age from the in-memory list.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.DownloadWorkerService
member.summary: Background service that processes download jobs immediately when they are enqueued.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.LibraryOrganizationService
member.summary: Determines the on-disk folder layout for downloaded videos.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.LibraryOrganizationService.GetVideoDirectory(Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.VideoMetadata,System.String)
member.summary: Returns the directory path where a video should be saved.
member.param: Optional base path override. Falls back to the global DownloadPath when null or empty.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.LibraryOrganizationService.GetPlaylistDirectory(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the base directory for a playlist download (no metadata available yet).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.LibraryOrganizationService.GetNfoPath(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the .nfo file path that corresponds to a given video file path.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.LibraryOrganizationService.GetThumbnailPath(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns the thumbnail path that corresponds to a given video file path. Jellyfin picks up {name}-thumb.jpg as an episode/item thumbnail.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.NfoWriterService
member.summary: Writes Kodi/Jellyfin-compatible .nfo metadata files for downloaded videos.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.NfoWriterService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.NfoWriterService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.NfoWriterService.WriteNfoAsync(Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Models.VideoMetadata,System.String)
member.summary: Writes an NFO file to using the provided .

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.ThumbnailService
member.summary: Downloads video thumbnails and channel poster images to disk.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.ThumbnailService.#ctor(System.Net.Http.IHttpClientFactory,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.ThumbnailService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.ThumbnailService.DownloadThumbnailAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Downloads an image from and saves it to . Failures are logged as warnings and do not throw.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.ThumbnailService.EnsureChannelPosterAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Downloads as poster.jpg inside only if no poster already exists.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.WatchedVideoCleanupService
member.summary: Listens for Jellyfin playback events and deletes watched videos that originated from scheduled downloads, then adds them to the download archive so they are not re-downloaded.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.YtDlpService
member.summary: Wraps YoutubeDLSharp to fetch metadata and download videos via yt-dlp.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.YtDlpService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.YtDlpService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.YtDlpService.FetchMetadataAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetches video metadata without downloading the video. Returns null if the fetch fails.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.YtDlpService.DownloadVideoAsync(System.String,System.String,System.IProgress{YoutubeDLSharp.DownloadProgress},System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.String)
member.summary: Downloads a single video to the specified output directory.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTube.Services.YtDlpService.DownloadPlaylistAsync(System.String,System.String,System.IProgress{YoutubeDLSharp.DownloadProgress},System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.String,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Downloads all videos in a playlist to the specified output directory.
